title: CarPlan De-Icer (300ml, Pack of 1)
features: SUPERIOR DE-ICING PERFORMANCE: CarPlan Blue Star De-Icer Boasts Superior De-Icing Properties That Work Swiftly, Ensuring You Spend Less Time Clearing Ice.
FAST AND EFFECTIVE: CarPlan Blue Star De-Icer is specially designed to quickly melt ice on vehicle windshields, providing a clear and streak-free finish
EFFECTIVE IN EXTREME COLD: CarPlan Blue Star De-Icer is designed to work reliably in temperatures as low as -15°C, ensuring you're prepared for harsh winter weather.
NON-HARSH FORMULA: Unlike some de-icers, this product does not contain harsh chemicals, making it safer for your vehicle and the environment.
EASY APPLICATION: This De-Icer Comes in an Easy-to-Use Aerosol Spray Can, Making It Convenient for Hassle-Free Application.
